name: Chains of Judgment
short_description: Homicide detective Ralph is distraught when his trusted, reliable partner goes missing around the same time strange killings begin to take place. While solving the case, Ralph is paired up with an impish rookie he can't get along with.
detailed_description:
Ralph is a veteran homicide detective who has a high service record. His reliable partner, and best friend, Nathan, has been with him for the past 5 years. Together, the two of them have solved multiple cases together.
One day, a strange killing occurs where the victim is bound in chains, and their skin is carved with a cryptic message. At the same time, Nathan disappears without a trace. Ralph grows worried for his friend when more killings with the same M.O. begin to appear.
While chasing clues, Ralph is partnered up with a rookie detective named Tyler who doesn't take his job seriously. Will Ralph be able to solve the mystery of the Chain Killings with his new carefree partner?



A stone-faced detective who's always stressed out. Appears older than his age.


A kind, compassionate detective who worries easily.


An impish rookie detective with a nonchalant attitude.


Investigate crime scenes
Interrogate witnesses and suspects
Solve puzzles
Partial voice acting

DISCLAIMER!
CONTAINS blood, death, suicide, homicide, child abuse, tobacco and alcohol usage, violence, and profanity.
